T0098.title: Forced Account Login
T0098.definition: The act of forcibly logging into user accounts using technical means to steal internal sensitive information.
T0098.description: Attackers exploit vulnerabilities or use credential-stuffing techniques to breach platform defenses and forcibly access user account backends, stealing order details, addresses, and other private data. This high-value information is then packaged and sold to downstream fraud or marketing groups. In data-trading advertisements, the term “forced login” is often used to indicate the data’s source and freshness.
